optparse/Option/nargs.name: nargs
optparse/Option/nargs.description: (default: 1) How many arguments of type type should be consumed when this option is seen. If > 1, optparse will store a tuple of values to dest.

info.excerpt: (default: 1) How many arguments of type type should be consumed when this option is seen. If > 1, optparse will store a tuple of values to dest.
